No public MSL int4 scalar exists; this kernel uses signed nibble quantization as an honest packed proxy. air=probe_int4_proxy.air
No public MSL uint4 scalar exists; this kernel uses unsigned nibble quantization as an honest packed proxy. air=probe_uint4_proxy.air
No public MSL FP4 scalar exists; this kernel uses a 2e1m-style minifloat proxy without microscaling. air=probe_fp4_proxy.air
No public MSL TF32 scalar exists; this kernel uses mantissa truncation as an honest TF32-style proxy. air=probe_tf32_proxy.air
No public MSL FP8 e4m3 scalar exists; this is a software minifloat proxy. air=probe_fp8_e4m3_proxy.air
No public MSL FP8 e5m2 scalar exists; this is a software minifloat proxy. air=probe_fp8_e5m2_proxy.air
MXFP8 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus FP8 e4m3-style quantization. air=probe_mxfp8_proxy.air
MXINT8 is approximated as threadgroup-scale quantize/dequantize with signed int8 range. air=probe_mxint8_proxy.air
MXFP6 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus a 3e2m-style minifloat proxy. air=probe_mxfp6_proxy.air
MXFP4 is approximated as threadgroup-scale microscaling plus a 2e1m-style minifloat proxy. air=probe_mxfp4_proxy.air
